mapper.sql:
SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DISPATCH_TYPE, WORK_POSITION_CODE, WORK_POSITION_NAME, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, NUM, EQUIPMENT_IDS, EQUIPMENT_NAMES, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH where WORK_PLAN_ID = #{workPlanId}
and DISPATCH_TYPE = #{dispatchType}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DISPATCH_TYPE, WORK_POSITION_CODE, WORK_POSITION_NAME, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, NUM, EQUIPMENT_IDS, EQUIPMENT_NAMES, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_PRD_DISPATCH
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_PRD_DISPATCH( ID, WORK_PLAN_ID, DISPATCH_TYPE, WORK_POSITION_CODE, WORK_POSITION_NAME, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME, NUM, EQUIPMENT_IDS, EQUIPMENT_NAMES, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{workPlanId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{dispatchType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPositionCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workPositionName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{num, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{equipmentIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{equipmentNames, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_PRD_DISPATCH SET DISPATCH_TYPE = #{dispatchType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_POSITION_CODE = #{workPositionCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, WORK_POSITION_NAME = #{workPositionName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_CODE = #{equipmentTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_TYPE_NAME = #{equipmentTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NUM = #{num,jdbcType=INTEGER}, EQUIPMENT_IDS = #{equipmentIds, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, EQUIPMENT_NAMES = #{equipmentNames, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
